questions.text: Which event is generally considered the start of World War II in Europe?
options: The signing of the Munich Agreement

questions.text: Who were the main Axis powers during World War II?
options: United States, United Kingdom, and Soviet Union

questions.text: What was the codename for the Allied invasion of Normandy on June 6, 1944?
The systematic persecution and murder of six million Jews by the Nazi regime and its collaborators is known as:
Which two Japanese cities were targeted by atomic bombs in August 1945?
What international organization was founded in 1945 to promote peace and security?
The period of geopolitical tension between the United States and the Soviet Union after World War II is known as:
What was the purpose of the Marshall Plan after World War II?
options: To provide economic aid to Western Europe
To establish a military alliance in Asia
To rebuild infrastructure in North Africa
To fund scientific research in the Soviet Union
questions.answer: To provide economic aid to Western Europe

questions.text: Who was the Prime Minister of the United Kingdom for most of World War II?
In what country is the Yellow River found?
